content:
感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：無還的血與沙，今日發佈～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！ （二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：無還的血與沙
沙漠裡的太陽和其他地方並不一樣，它蒼白、刺眼而酷烈，從未有過溫柔的一面。野獸無法想像你口中所描述的春天，那麼就請你替他去看一看，那所謂真正的太陽吧。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
規劃：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

《Morimens》OST：《Blood and Sand Without Return》 was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

《Morimens》OST：《Blood and Sand Without Return》 
The sun in the desert is unlike anywhere else; it's pale, glaring, and fierce, never showing a gentle side. Beasts can't imagine the spring you describe, so go see the so-called real sun for them.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘卻前夜OST：無還的血與沙
